note: Counts are migration-planning evidence, not a product-quality score. Category ownership and focused behavior tests are the contract.

categories.owner: RawInjectionPolicy and the explicit ruby.Syntax/native extension boundary
categories.action: Retain only at checked, user-authorized raw Ruby seams.

categories.owner: Focused RailsHx artifact extractors and their compiler delegates
categories.action: Move ordinary Ruby syntax into focused IR emitters as each Rails slice is extracted.
Replace ordinary Ruby syntax and semantic transforms with structural RubyAST slices.
Keep decisions in the validated callable plan and migrate remaining adapter text structurally.

categories.owner: RubyHx profile and hxruby compatibility semantics
categories.action: Retain only where target syntax is secondary to an independently tested semantic bridge.
Add declaration nodes incrementally without changing public Ruby shape.
Remove print-then-reembed bridges family by family; never add one to a migrated path.
Retain the raw node definitions while validating structural nodes before printing.
Retain exactly one AST-to-file print at the final compiler output boundary.
